## Your teachable AI intern for everyday browser work

88 followers

Visit website

Web browsers

•

AI Workflow Automation

Aye is a Chromium-based AI browser for macOS and Windows that gives web work a teachable AI intern. It reads visible pages, plans steps, and works through normal browser actions: clicking, typing, scrolling, switching tabs, and checking results. Summarize pages, research across tabs, draft replies, and automate repeatable workflows. Turn recurring tasks into reusable skills, separate accounts with profiles, and stay in control with reviewable progress and approval for sensitive steps.

Free [...] Promoted

Siyan Chen

📌

Hi Product Hunt! I'm excited to share Aye, an AI browser for macOS and Windows built by Zhonglin Liu.  
  
Browser work often starts with a simple goal but turns into a long chain of reading, comparing, clicking, and rewriting. Aye helps carry that work forward through visible, reviewable actions on real websites.  
  
It can summarize and translate pages, research across tabs, draft content, and automate repeatable workflows. Recurring tasks can be turned into reusable skills, while sensitive steps stay under your approval.  
  
I'd love to hear what browser workflows you would want Aye to handle. [...] Overview

Thanks a lot for your feedback, Yes we are working on upgrading the keyboard layouts and functions. It would available very soon!

Report

•1 review

Decent and cheap VPS, with fast internet speed, the cons is slower disk performance, which causes Windows to lag sometimes and programs running slower. When I ran CrystalDIskMark, the speed appears to be 60% slower (~150 MB/s) than my SATA SSD (~500 MB/s). And copy/paste often stops working after long use. Other than that, it's great for general use. [...] scheduling issues (2)

Report

Amazing. Overall not very laggy, very clean, and extremely useful. It's like the better incognito mode. One suggestion for the devs is maybe a dark mode. Finally, I was also wondering what the ETA is for some of the products. Thanks!

Anh Nguyen [...] One Dollar Resume Review

One Dollar Resume Review

Maker

@borja\_diazroig Thanks a ton Borja!   
  
All CVs are checked by an AI in this case. We have prepared this tool based on our own experience of running a recruiting firm and having helped 20+ companies build their teams.   
  
This tool does a far better job than all other tools out there, and we provide a lot of extra valuable suggestions like job recommendations, hackathons, etc. on the basis of the profile of the user.

Report

Niraj Sheladiya

Kudos to @itsharshag idea! After reviewing thousands of resumes and working with top founders, you’ve channeled that experience into an AI tool that highlights common resume issues. Excited to see how it helps job seekers!
